initiatives.name: The STAY Project
initiatives.description: A youth-led organization building power through mutual aid, leadership development, and organizing across Central Appalachia. STAY works to create sustainable and inclusive communities while supporting young people fighting for social, economic, and environmental justice.

initiatives.name: Project Mayday
initiatives.description: Peer-led harm reduction & mutual aid in WV.

initiatives.name: The West Virginia Trans Coalition
initiatives.description: A grassroots org that works to ensure the wellbeing, safety, & lived equity of Trans, NB, & GNC WVians
